privileged_info_for_vlm: The input file is located at /home/ga/Documents/global_stunting_2022.csv. The correct output data contains exactly 26 rows of countries with a percentage >= 30.0. When sorted in descending order, the top country must be Burundi with a percentage of 50.9.
